description: This pipeline processes incoming data by creating a visual representation in the form of a histogram plot, and then outputs the result as part of a larger compartment. The histogram is generated based on the input data, providing a graphical summary of the distribution of values. The output is then made available for further processing or analysis within the compartment.

86713063-8c6f-4054-afbd-c7f2ce208ac3.name: plot-table:plot-histogram
86713063-8c6f-4054-afbd-c7f2ce208ac3.description: Plots the incoming table(s). This node will create a JFreeChart Histogram plot.
